prompt: Enhance the table design on this slide and incorporate some icons.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Redesign the table by applying a modern and clean aesthetic, using a professional color palette to enhance visual hierarchy and readability. Integrate a small, relevant icon next to each row header in the first column (Phases, Lock Release, Cascading Rollbacks, Concurrency), ensuring icons are consistent in style and visually represent their respective concepts. Maintain all original text content and the overall layout of the table within the slide.
objects: Redesigned table with modern and clean aesthetic, and professional color palette
Row header "Phases" with a small, relevant icon
Row header "Lock Release" with a small, relevant icon
Row header "Cascading Rollbacks" with a small, relevant icon
Row header "Concurrency" with a small, relevant icon
Original text content in all table cells (data content)
